bsky.name: Maureen Johnson
bsky.text: I look for info on the McConnell situation about 5 times a day, because--legitimately--as a mystery writer I have a major interest in how you hide a dead body.

bsky.name: Tiger Pournelle, Furious Irish🏳️‍🌈
bsky.text: A year and a half after he took office, and still claiming they inherited a mess is NOT the flex they believe. You can't get shit together in that time? Then it's YOU, bitch.
bsky.ko: **취임한 지 1년 반**이 지났는데도 아직도 물려받은 게 엉망이라고 우겨대는 게 자기들 생각처럼 자랑거리가 아니야. 그 시간 동안 제대로 하나도 못 챙겼다고? 그럼 **문제는 너야**, 이 자식아.

bsky.text:
Bear was never taught this, it's something he's learned all on his own. He knows Honey is deaf and is always looking out for her.

They were all adopted from a shelter after originally being rescued from a puppy farm. 

TT: @kellydinham
bsky.ko: **Bear**는 이걸 배운 적이 없어. 순전히 혼자 스스로 터득한 거야. **Honey가 귀가 안 들린다는 걸** 알고 늘 챙겨준다니까. 얘들은 원래 **강아지 공장**에서 구조된 뒤에 보호소에서 다 같이 입양됐어. TT: @kellydinham
